areas.cta: Looking for cleaning services near you? Contact Blinklean today.

process.title: How Blinklean Works
process.subtitle: Getting professional cleaning or scrap pickup is simple and hassle-free.
process.step1_desc: Browse our services including home cleaning, vehicle cleaning, laundry services, and scrap recycling.
process.step2_desc: Reach out through WhatsApp or our platform to request the service you need.
process.step3_desc: Our team coordinates with you and schedules the service at your convenient time.
process.step4_desc: Our trained team arrives at your location and completes the service efficiently.

trust.title: Why Customers Trust Blinklean
trust.subtitle: We are committed to providing reliable, professional, and eco-friendly cleaning and recycling services.
trust.card1_desc: Our team members are trained and verified to provide safe and reliable services.
trust.card2_desc: We use environmentally friendly cleaning methods and waterless vehicle cleaning solutions.
trust.card3_desc: Customers always know what service they are receiving with clear communication.
trust.card4_desc: All services are delivered directly at your location for maximum convenience.
trust.card5_desc: Scrap materials are collected responsibly and sent for proper recycling.
trust.card6_desc: Our team is available to assist customers through WhatsApp and online support.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Blinklean services.
faq.a1: Blinklean is your one-stop clean-tech platform providing professional House Cleaning, innovative Waterless Vehicle Detailing, Fabric-safe Laundry, and incentivized Scrap Recycling services directly at your doorstep.
faq.a2: We are hyper-local in Bengaluru, Hassan and Amaravathi (AP), serving key areas including Vijayanagar, Chandra Layout, Attiguppe, Rajajinagar, Rajarajeshwari Nagar, Hassan and Amaravathi. We are rapidly expanding to other urban clusters!
faq.q3: How can I book a scrap recycling service?
faq.a3: Simply click on the 'Sell Scrap on WhatsApp' button. Our AI-assisted chat will help you schedule a pickup. A verified agent will then visit with digital scales, pay you instantly at best market rates, and collect the items.
faq.a4: Absolutely! Environmental sustainability is at our core. Our vehicle cleaning is 100% waterless, saving up to 200L of water per wash, and we use biodegradable cleaning agents for all residential tasks.
faq.q5: Will services be available through an app?
faq.a5: Yes, our AI-powered mobile app is in the final stages of development. It will feature real-time tracking, service history, and one-tap rebooking for a truly frictionless experience.

scrap_promo.title: Turn Your Scrap into Cash
scrap_promo.desc: Why throw it away when you can get paid? Schedule a pickup for newspapers, plastic, metal, and electronic waste. Our verified agents collect it from your doorstep and pay you instantly.
scrap_promo.prices_note: * Best market prices determined at pickup based on current recycling rates.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Thousands of Happy Customers
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from people who rely on Blinklean every day for their home and vehicle care across Karnataka.
testimonials.review1_text: “The bathroom cleaning service was excellent. The team arrived on time and left the space spotless. Highly recommend!”
testimonials.review2_text: “Very professional and affordable. Booking was simple and the results were amazing. Will definitely book again for my monthly maintenance.”
testimonials.review3_text: “Car cleaning service was quick and thorough. The team was polite and used high-quality products. 5-stars for the eco-friendly approach!”

community.title: Our Green Initiatives

services_page.hero_subtitle: Choose from our range of tech-enabled services designed for the modern urban lifestyle.
services_page.residential_desc: Complete restoration of your living spaces by experts.
services_page.deep_cleaning_desc: Targeted cleaning for high-utility hygiene areas.
services_page.vehicle_care_desc: Eco-friendly detailing that saves water and adds shine.
services_page.laundry_desc: Professional garment care delivered to your door.
services_page.scrap_cash_desc: Book a doorstep pickup for your recyclable materials today.
services_page.bhk1_desc: Detailed floor-to-ceiling cleaning for compact living spaces. Includes dust removal and sanitization.
services_page.bhk2_desc: Thorough deep clean for small families. Covers kitchen greasing, bathroom scaling, and floor polishing.
services_page.bhk3_desc: Full-spectrum home detailing for large apartments. Every corner meticulously scrubbed and polished.
services_page.kitchen_desc: High-intensity degreasing for chimneys, cabinets, and tiles. Restores your kitchen to showroom shine.
services_page.bathroom_desc: Descaling of fittings and anti-bacterial scrub for tiles and floors. Hygiene focused deep clean.
services_page.sofa_desc: Premium foam-based extraction for fabric and leather. Removes deep-seated allergens and stains.
services_page.car_wash_desc: Premium waterless exterior detailing using eco-safe polymer sprays. Saves 200L of water while leaving a high-gloss protective wax coating.
services_page.car_care_desc: Comprehensive waterless treatment including exterior wax wash, interior vacuuming, and dashboard conditioning.
services_page.bike_detail_desc: Expert detailing for motorcycles and scooters. Includes chain lubrication and high-gloss paint protection.
services_page.wash_fold_desc: Daily wear laundry cleaned with premium detergents, neatly folded and packed. Minimum 3kg.
services_page.wash_iron_desc: Complete garment care including washing and professional steam ironing for a crisp look.
services_page.dry_clean_desc: Gentle chemical cleaning for silks, woolens, and designer wear. Preserves fabric life and color.

scrap_recycling_page.hero_subtitle: Schedule a door-step scrap pick-up instantly. Professional collection and instant payment.
scrap_recycling_page.final_value_note: * Final value will be determined at the time of collection based on current market rates and digital weighing scales.
